live_message: Theresa Mills is on a call right now. The agent is qualifying her — AC out, three-bedroom ranch, asking about same-day service.
live_message_es: Theresa Mills está en una llamada ahora mismo. El agente la está calificando — AC sin funcionar, casa rancho de tres habitaciones, preguntando por servicio el mismo día.

calls.name: Theresa Mills
calls.summary: Currently on call — AC down, same-day request

transcript.text: Valley HVAC, how can I help?
My air conditioning is dead. It's ninety-two degrees in here.
I can get a tech out today. What's your address and what kind of system do you have?
Twelve fifty-seven Cedar Lane. It's a central system, about ten years old. Carrier brand.
Got it. I have a tech who can be there between 4:00 and 6:00 PM. Diagnostic is $89, applied toward repair. Does that work?
Yes please.

calls.summary_long: Theresa Mills, 1257 Cedar Lane, AC failure — 10yr Carrier central system. Booked same-day diagnostic 4:00-6:00 PM window, $89 diag fee applied to repair if she proceeds. Tech: Mike R. (auto-assigned by proximity). Call in progress to confirm phone number for ETA SMS.

calls.name: Robert Chen

transcript.text: Valley HVAC, how can I help?
My furnace stopped overnight. House is fifty-eight degrees.
That's a priority call. Are you a returning customer?
Yeah. Robert Chen, Maple Street.

I see you, Robert. Same furnace, the Lennox we serviced in twenty twenty-three. I can get a tech to you at 4:00 PM today. Diagnostic is waived for returning customers — you only pay if there's a repair.
Perfect.
You're confirmed for today 4:00 PM. I'll text you the tech's ETA forty minutes out. Stay warm.

calls.summary_long: Robert Chen — returning customer, Maple Street. Lennox furnace failure (last serviced 2023). Booked same-day 4:00 PM diagnostic. Returning-customer waiver applied — no diag fee. Tech ETA SMS scheduled.

calls.name: Kevin Pace
calls.summary: Booked Friday 11:00 AM — duct cleaning estimate

calls.name: Marcus Olivier
calls.summary: After-hours booked Saturday 8:00 AM — emergency furnace

transcript.text: Valley HVAC after-hours, how can I help?
Furnace just died. I have an infant in the house.
Understood. Where are you located?
South Whitehall, about ten minutes from your shop.

I have a tech finishing a call near there. He can be at your place by 8:30 PM tonight, or first thing Saturday at 8:00 AM. After-hours rate is $189 plus parts. Saturday morning is the regular $89 diag.
If the baby's okay with the space heater, I'll do Saturday morning to save the money.
Smart call. Saturday 8:00 AM, first slot. Tech will text you Friday night to confirm. If conditions change tonight, call us back — we'll dispatch immediately.

calls.summary_long: Marcus Olivier — South Whitehall, furnace failure with infant in house. Offered same-night after-hours dispatch ($189) vs. Saturday 8:00 AM regular ($89). Caller chose Saturday morning. Safety check applied — instructed to call back if conditions worsen. Booked Saturday 8:00 AM first slot.

calls.name: Sandra Ruiz
calls.summary: Booked Monday 10:00 AM — heat pump install quote
